executives.name: Ed Farid
executives.background: Mr. Farid was appointed Executive Vice President and Chief Corporate Development Officer in 2020. He previously served as Senior Vice President, Business Development and Strategy at Alacer Gold.

tenure_dates.title: Director, Metals and Mining Investment Banking

executives.name: John Belanger
executives.background: Chief Operating Officer of Global X Management Company LLC since 2020. Previously served as Head of Product at Global X.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President (Product Management for ETN platform)

executives.name: Michael Klein
executives.background: Michael Klein served as the Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of AltC. He is the founder and managing partner of M. Klein and Company. He was previously at Citigroup.

executives.name: David Tait
executives.background: Mr. Tait is the Chief Executive Officer of the World Gold Council and serves as a Director of the Sponsor. He has extensive experience in the financial services industry, including roles at Credit Suisse and UBS.

tenure_dates.title: Global Head of Fixed Income Macro Products / Head of Global Foreign Exchange and Short-Term Interest Rate Trading
